tagline: Premium Pools, Landscaping, & Hardscapes in Southwest Illinois

hero.headline: Your Backyard Deserves a Masterpiece
hero.subheadline: From stunning swimming pools to custom hardscapes and lush landscaping, Creekside Landscapes transforms ordinary yards into extraordinary outdoor living spaces. Serving Edwardsville, Glen Carbon, Bethalto, and communities across southwest Illinois since 2018.
checkmarks: Upfront pricing with zero hidden fees
Quality assurance checks on every project

services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living Solutions
services.subtitle: From dream pool to finished patio, one trusted team handles it all.

cards.title: Swimming Pools & Pool Covers
cards.description: Custom inground pool installation paired with automatic safety covers, giving your family the backyard oasis you have always wanted.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Fire Features
cards.description: Entertain year-round with a chef-grade outdoor kitchen or a cozy fire pit that keeps the conversation going long after sunset.

cards.title: Paver & Flagstone Patios
cards.description: Expertly installed paver and flagstone patios that look stunning for decades, backed by premium Belgard materials and our workmanship guarantee.

cards.title: Pergolas & Pavilions
cards.description: Elegant shade structures that define your outdoor rooms and add real value to your property, custom-designed for your space.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Professional 3D landscape design brought to life with premium plantings, bed renovations, rock and mulch installations, and seasonal color.

cards.title: Retaining Walls & Outdoor Steps
cards.description: Functional retaining walls that solve drainage issues and decorative seating walls that turn your yard into an outdoor living room.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Outdoor Space

steps.title: Free Design Consultation
steps.description: We visit your property, listen to your vision, and discuss budget. You get honest recommendations with upfront pricing, never a surprise.

steps.title: Custom 3D Design & Planning
steps.description: Our team creates a detailed 3D design so you can see your project before a single stone is laid. Financing options available through HFS.

steps.title: Expert Build & Quality Checks
steps.description: Our experienced crew brings the design to life with regular quality assurance checks and customer follow-ups throughout the entire project.

about.label: Rooted in Southwest Illinois
about.headline: Passion for Landscaping Since Age Ten
about.description: Creekside Landscapes was founded by Destin Magnuson, who discovered his love for landscaping at just ten years old. With over half his life dedicated to mastering quality landscape care, Destin built Creekside on a simple promise: honest, ethical service with no hidden fees. Every project gets regular quality assurance checks and customer follow-ups because we believe the job is not done until you are thrilled with the result. We are proud to offer special discounts for military members, law enforcement, and seniors as our way of giving back to the community that trusts us with their homes.

features.title: No Hidden Fees, Ever
features.description: Every quote is detailed and upfront. The price we quote is the price you pay, guaranteed. No surprise charges after work begins.

features.title: Quality Assurance on Every Project
features.description: We perform regular quality checks during construction and follow up after completion to make sure everything meets our high standards.

features.title: Military, Senior & LEO Discounts
features.description: We proudly offer special discounts for military members, law enforcement officers, and seniors as our way of giving back to the community.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every quote is detailed and upfront. Financing available through HFS Home Improvement Loans so your dream backyard fits your budget.

guarantee.headline: Our Honest Service Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every project with regular quality assurance checks during construction and follow-up inspections after completion. If something is not right, we make it right. As a Belgard Authorized Contractor and BBB A+ rated business, our reputation depends on your complete satisfaction. That is a promise from our founder, Destin, to your family.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Illinois and Missouri?
faqs.answer: We serve Edwardsville, Glen Carbon, Bethalto, Maryville, Collinsville, O'Fallon, Godfrey, Troy, Alton, Belleville, Highland, and surrounding communities across Madison County, Jersey County, and Macoupin County in Illinois. We also serve St. Charles County and St. Louis County in Missouri.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool and hardscape projects?
faqs.answer: Yes. We partner with HFS Home Improvement Loans to offer flexible financing options that make it easier to bring your outdoor living vision to life without waiting.

faqs.question: What makes Creekside different from other landscaping companies?
faqs.answer: Our founder Destin has spent over half his life in landscape care. We provide upfront pricing with zero hidden fees, perform regular quality assurance checks during every project, and follow up after completion. We are also a Belgard Authorized Contractor and BBB A+ rated.

faqs.question: Do you offer discounts for military or seniors?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We proudly offer special discounts for military members, law enforcement officers, and seniors. Just mention your eligibility when you schedule your free consultation.

faqs.question: How long does a typical pool or patio installation take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary based on project scope. A paver patio typically takes one to two weeks, while a full swimming pool installation may take six to ten weeks. We provide a detailed timeline during your free design consultation so you know exactly what to expect.

testimonials.name: Deanna R.
testimonials.text: Creekside Landscapes does wonderful, quality work. Their staff is experienced and knowledgeable, and they believe in honesty and upfront pricing. We could not be happier with our new patio.

testimonials.name: Mark T.
testimonials.text: Very reliable service. They always show up when scheduled and keep you informed throughout the project. The quality assurance checks give you confidence the job is done right every single time.

testimonials.name: Sarah K.
testimonials.text: From the 3D design to the finished backyard, Destin and his crew exceeded every expectation. They were upfront about costs from day one and the military discount was a wonderful surprise. Highly recommend.

contact.headline: Ready to Transform Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Schedule your free design consultation today and get an honest, upfront quote with no pressure and no hidden fees.

footer.description: Creekside Landscapes is a premium outdoor living company serving southwest Illinois and the St. Louis metro area since 2018. From pools to patios, we build backyards families love.
footer.service_area: Serving Edwardsville, Glen Carbon, Bethalto, Maryville, Collinsville, O'Fallon, Godfrey, Troy, Alton, Belleville, and surrounding communities in SW Illinois & Eastern Missouri.
